status.partial: Scan complete; some items need attention
notice.crossAgentDetail: This result combines multiple agents to surface shared resources, cross-platform duplicates, and the overall inventory.
overview.priorityDetail: Items are ordered by risk and impact. Rescan after addressing each one.
overview.goodDetail: No high-risk issues, security conflicts, or duplicate installs found.
overview.cleanTitle: No obvious issues in the current scan scope
overview.cleanDetail: Rescan after adding skills, MCP servers, or agent configuration.
overview.platformDetail: Resources discovered in the current scope
issues.title: Issues
issues.subtitle: Security, conflicts, duplicates, and cost issues in one ordered list.
context.title: Context cost
context.subtitle: Fixed and on-demand costs are calculated separately to avoid misleading results.
context.empty: No context resources can be calculated
resources.title: Resources
resources.subtitle: View skills, rules, instructions, MCP, plugins, and memories together.
resources.name: Name
common.scanningDetail: Discovering resources and analysing conflicts, security risks, and context cost.
result.contextOverBudget.title: Fixed context cost exceeds the budget
result.contextOverBudget.summary: Fixed cost is about {{cost}} tokens; the budget is {{budget}} tokens.
scanPaths.title: Scan paths
scanPaths.subtitle: Manage Skill, MCP, and Plugin scan sources by agent.
scanPaths.help: System default paths are shown even when absent. Project paths are resolved from the current project; user paths support ~.
manage.title: Manage & export
manage.subtitle: Install trusted skills, manage registered resources, and export reports.
scanPaths.skillDescription: Skill directories, rules, or instruction files
scanPaths.mcpDescription: JSON or TOML files containing MCP server definitions
scanPaths.empty: This agent has no built-in {{resource}} configuration.
manage.installSubtitle: Preview a source, then choose the skills to sync to the target agent.
manage.localOnly: The backend reads the disk path directly; file contents are not uploaded.
manage.link: Use symlinks to keep local changes in sync
manage.targetSubtitle: Check duplicate names and existing capabilities before sync.
manage.targetEmpty: This agent has no skills yet.
manage.reclaimSubtitle: Move real directories to the central library and replace them with links; existing links are omitted.
manage.reclaimableDetail: Resolve central-library conflicts when same-named content differs.
manage.reclaimEmpty: No physical skills can be reclaimed for this agent and scope.
manage.reportSubtitle: Keep local diagnostic results for sharing.
manage.staticReportDetail: Includes resources, conflicts, security, and cleanup advice.
manage.registryEmpty: No resources have been installed through Skill Doctor.
manage.reclaimed: Reclaimed {{count}} skills and linked them in the agent.
manage.identicalCopy: Identical content already in central library
progress.discovering: Discovering skills, rules, instructions, and MCP configuration
progress.conflicts: Checking duplicate installs and trigger conflicts
progress.context: Estimating fixed and on-demand context cost
warning.aiNotConfigured: AI audit did not run because no analysis service is configured.
warning.contextFailed: Context cost analysis did not finish: {{error}}
issue.duplicateSummary: The same resource name is installed in multiple locations, which can cause version drift or unclear load order.
issue.conflictSummary: The two resources share {{count}} trigger or description keywords.
recommendation.aiAudit: Review the evidence and full instructions before changing or disabling the resource.
recommendation.contextBudget: Review always-on instructions, MCP tool descriptions, and broad skill metadata first.
recommendation.cachedPlugin: This is cached UI metadata; being visible does not mean it is enabled or included in model context.
recommendation.cachedPluginEntry: Cached directory entry · {{invocation}} · excluded from context cost.
audit.shellExecTitle: Review instructions that may execute shell commands
audit.networkCallTitle: Confirm whether external network requests are necessary
audit.shellExecRecommendation: Limit executable command scope and require confirmation before high-impact commands.
audit.destructiveRecommendation: Remove unguarded destructive steps and add previews, backups, and explicit confirmation.
audit.secretLeakRecommendation: Do not output raw secrets; use redacted values or secure credential references.
audit.networkCallRecommendation: Describe the destination and fields sent, and require confirmation before upload.
audit.unknownRecommendation: Review the full instructions and actual usage scenario manually.
context.toggleConfirm: {{action}} {{name}}? This change takes effect in a new Codex session.
context.updatedNewSession: Configuration updated; it takes effect in a new session.
onboarding.title: Confirm scan target
onboarding.subtitle: Analysis runs locally by default. Confirm the project and agent before scanning.
onboarding.projectDirectoryDetail: Used to find AGENTS.md, skills, MCP, and other agent configuration in this project.
onboarding.scopeHelp: {{project}} is in this directory; {{global}} is in your user directory and can affect multiple projects.
onboarding.agentDetail: Choose the agent used by this project; cross-agent overview is for shared resources and a unified inventory.
onboarding.noAgents: No known agent configuration was found here; choose Cross-agent overview for a complete check.
onboarding.analysisDetail: Context cost connects to MCP to list tools; stdio configuration can start local commands. Only check trusted projects.
onboarding.standardDetail: Static security, keyword conflicts, and context cost
onboarding.deepAvailable: Use configured semantic or AI analysis capabilities
onboarding.private: Skill content is not uploaded by default; deep checkup only uses services you configured.
onboarding.agentRequired: Choose a current agent or explicitly choose Cross-agent overview.
settings.title: Scan settings
settings.subtitle: Control analysis depth, scope, and the cost budget.
settings.contextDetail: Calculate fixed and on-demand token cost
settings.disabledDetail: Exclude from totals and show separately
settings.cacheDetail: Show UI-visible items only; exclude from context
settings.mcp: Connect to MCP for tool lists
settings.mcpDetail: May start a local stdio server; enable only for trusted configuration
settings.conflictsHelp: Keyword analysis stays local; semantic embeddings call your configured service and can find similar capabilities expressed differently.
settings.aiConflictDetail: Generate overlap areas and boundary explanations for conflicts
settings.budgetHelp: Used to flag excessive fixed context; it does not limit the agent's actual context window.
settings.tokenizerHelp: OpenAI tokenizer is more accurate; approximate estimation uses character counts and is better for quick comparisons.
drawer.compare: Compare both resources side by side
drawer.deleteWarning: This deletes the selected skill directory or file and cannot be undone in Skill Doctor.
drawer.confirmPath: Enter the full path to confirm
drawer.consumerImpact: Changing this file affects these {{count}} agents.
drawer.author: Author
compare.title: Resource comparison
error.projectNotDirectory: Project path is not a directory: {{path}}
error.directoryPicker: Could not open the system directory picker: {{error}}
validation.agentObject: Configuration for {{platform}} must be an object.
validation.invalidMcpFormat: {{path}} MCP format must be json or toml.
